falsification_conditions.condition: S&P 500 closes below 4200 at any point in the next 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: The 78% pattern match to bottom_2024_aug is invalidated because the August 2024 bottom held at ~4400; a 200-point deeper breakdown shows this is not that pattern and the UNKNOWN verdict was wrong to suggest similarity

falsification_conditions.condition: VIX closes above 35 for 2 consecutive days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: The BLOWOFF SCORE of 39 suggests controlled selling; sustained VIX above 35 indicates panic-driven liquidation, proving the current signal is not a bottom formation but an accelerating crash, invalidating the HOLD signal

falsification_conditions.condition: 10Y-2Y Treasury spread inverts further by >25bps from current level within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A deepening inversion would signal recession acceleration that the pattern match failed to capture, proving the macro regime has shifted beyond the August 2024 analog and the UNKNOWN verdict was a false neutral

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
